concerns.text: Figure 1 (citevqa_example.pdf) and Figure 2 (citevqa_pipeline.pdf) lack explicit axis labels or unit definitions in their captions where statistical distributions or pipeline metrics are implied. The caption for Fig 1(c) mentions 'Performance of MLLMs' but does not define the Y-axis unit (SAA score 0-100) within the figure itself or caption, relying on the reader to infer from the text. Per spec, figures must be self-contained.

Figure 3 (question_statistics.pdf) and Figure 4 (pdf_statistics.pdf) are referenced in Section 3.4 but their internal legends (e.g., 'Domain-specific Question Types') are not described in the captions. The caption for Fig 3 lists 'Left', 'Middle', 'Right' but does not define the color coding or specific metrics plotted, making the figure illegible without cross-referencing the main text.

Case Study figures (Simple_Case.pdf, Case_Study1.pdf, Case_Study2.pdf) referenced in Section 5.2 and Appendix lack annotation verification. The code comment at line 45 explicitly flags: 'NOTE: Case study figures... require legibility verification at 10pt scale and annotation with arrows/bounding boxes'. The current LaTeX source does not show these annotations, risking illegibility at print scale.

Figure 5 (citevqa_ability_radar.pdf) and Figure 7 (citevqa_domain_radar.pdf) are radar charts. The captions do not specify the scale (0-100 or 0-1) or the specific metric (SAA) being plotted on the axes, violating the requirement for figures to earn their place by being self-explanatory.
